title: Postgres Backend Migration & Profile Parity
author: orchestrator
summary: Replace SQLite runtime with Postgres for live state, add DuckDB for analytical reads, then achieve profile parity between repo source and installed OpenCode config.

current_state.runtime_backend: SQLite via bun:sqlite or node:sqlite (db.bun.ts / db.node.ts)
current_state.adapter_seam: DatabaseAdapter.Service exists with Interface (query/transaction/afterCommit), SQLiteAdapter impl, PostgresTransactionOptions typed but unused. Zero production consumers of the adapter.
current_state.schemas: 8 schema files using sqliteTable from drizzle-orm/sqlite-core
current_state.live_call_sites: 13 Database.use/transaction in src/ (excl adapter bridge), ~58 in 13 test files, ~32 test files import resetDatabase()
current_state.adapter_consumers: 16 source files already use DatabaseAdapter.Service via yield* pattern
current_state.postgres_packages: None - no pg, PGlite, @effect/sql-pg, or drizzle-orm/pg-core imports exist
current_state.profile_parity: Installed OpenCode config has wave model + gate behavior not yet reflected in source prompts/docs

tracks.name: Database Migration
tracks.exit_condition: Postgres is the authoritative write path, DuckDB wired for synthesis, SQLite no longer the default backend

phases.name: Postgres Driver & Dependencies
phases.description: Add PGlite (@electric-sql/pglite) for local/desktop and pg for CI. Add drizzle-orm/pg-core adapter (already in drizzle-orm package).
phases.acceptance: bun add completes, typecheck passes, drizzle-orm/pg-core imports resolve

phases.name: Postgres Schema Files
phases.description: Create parallel .pg.sql.ts schema files alongside existing .sqlite.sql.ts files. Each maps sqliteTable -> pgTable, text({mode:'json'}) -> jsonb(), integer({mode:'boolean'}) -> boolean(). Extract shared column helpers to common file.
phases.acceptance: Each .pg.sql.ts file: imports from drizzle-orm/pg-core, uses pgTable(), jsonb() for JSON columns, boolean() for boolean columns, same $type<> generics, same index/primaryKey/references API. typecheck passes.
phases.blocking_defects: Timestamps helper in schema.sql.ts uses integer() from sqlite-core - needs parallel version from pg-core

phases.name: PostgresAdapter Implementation
phases.description: Add PostgresAdapter in adapter.ts or new adapter.pg.ts. Implements same Interface as SQLiteAdapter. Uses PGlite for local path, pg driver for CI. Handles async Postgres methods (the adapter already uses Effect.tryPromise). Uncomment PgClient compat check. Wire defaultLayer for config-based selection.
phases.acceptance: PostgresAdapter compiles, defaultLayer accepts feature-flag, adapter unit tests pass with both adapters

phases.name: Postgres Migration Config
phases.description: Create drizzle.config.pg.ts with dialect: 'postgresql'. Generate initial Postgres migration. Wire schema selection to pick .pg.sql.ts files.
phases.acceptance: drizzle-kit generates valid Postgres DDL from .pg.sql.ts schemas

phases.name: Migrate Production Database.use/transaction Call Sites
phases.description: Convert remaining 13 direct Database.use/transaction call sites in src/ to use DatabaseAdapter.Service. Priority order: data-migration.ts (4 sites, inside Effect.gen), project/project.ts (3 standalone functions), control-plane/workspace.ts (synced()), sync/index.ts (process - nested tx seam), server/projectors.ts (convertEvent - non-Effect callback), server/shared/fence.ts (load - non-Effect). Handle nested transaction pattern via LocalContext.
phases.acceptance: Zero direct Database.use/transaction calls remain in src/ (except adapter bridge). All production code goes through DatabaseAdapter.Service or has explicit SQLite-only seam.
phases.blocking_defects: server/projectors.ts and server/shared/fence.ts have non-Effect callback signatures that require architectural changes beyond simple wrapping. May need deferred-seam marking.

phases.name: Migrate Test Database.use Call Sites
phases.description: Convert ~58 Database.use call sites across 13 test files to use DatabaseAdapter.Service. Update ~32 resetDatabase() callers. Provide Postgres layer in testEffect composition.
phases.acceptance: All tests pass under both SQLite and Postgres adapters. No test file calls Database.use() directly.
phases.blocking_defects: Phase 1.5 must be complete first. PGlite/pg must work in CI.

phases.name: DuckDB Analytical Sidecar (Stretch)
phases.description: Add DuckDB dependency and analytical query capability. Wire built-in tools to use Postgres for live state and DuckDB for analytical synthesis. Agents get decisions, not raw rows.
phases.acceptance: DuckDB analytical queries return synthesized answers. Tools can read from DuckDB sidecar.
phases.blocking_defects: Deferred - stretch goal. Not required for primary exit condition.

phases.name: SQLite Deprecation & Cleanup
phases.description: Mark SQLite as legacy. Remove db.bun.ts + db.node.ts fallbacks. Merge schema files back to single pg-core-backed source (remove .sqlite.sql.ts). Clean up PRAGMAs, journal-based migration loading. Remove resetDatabase() SQLite file deletion.
phases.acceptance: SQLite is no longer the default backend. No SQLite-specific files in src/storage/. All tests pass with Postgres.
phases.blocking_defects: Phases 1.5 and 1.6 complete; Postgres adapter is integration-tested — CI + local Pg service

tracks.name: Profile Parity
tracks.exit_condition: Repo-side prompts/config/docs match installed OpenCode behavior and no longer drift back to builder-style execution

phases.name: Orchestrator Wave Model in Source
phases.description: Encode the learning-first, delegate-first flow, no-self-inspection rule before learning returns, and concrete approval-artifact gates (plan_approval.v1.json, red_team_approval.v1.json, repair_plan_approval.v1.json) as first-class behavior.
files_changed: config/agent_config/ or prompts/ (source equivalents of installed OpenCode profiles)
phases.acceptance: Source-backed orchestrator prompt matches installed behavior. Approval artifacts are enforced as gates.

phases.name: Reviewer Set Cleanup & Posture
phases.description: Clean up legacy rig-* source profiles. Add long-horizon senior-engineer behavior as default for plan-critic and adversaries. Enforce 'three long-run proposals' requirement on blocking reviews.
phases.acceptance: Source prompt files contain the same reviewer posture as installed config.

phases.name: Validation Flow Alignment
phases.description: Make execution, repair, validator, and prepublication agree on self-validation-before-handoff rule in source, not just in ~/.config/opencode.
phases.acceptance: Source prompts encode the self-validation-before-handoff rule.

phases.name: Documentation Update
phases.description: Update docs to reflect Postgres/DuckDB backend truth. Remove SQLite assumptions. Profile/protocol docs should describe contracts and evidence, not backend details.
phases.acceptance: Documentation is backend-agnostic where appropriate, accurate where backend-specific.
phases.blocking_defects: Track 1 must be substantially complete - profiles should describe the final backend contract

dependencies.rationale: Profile parity should describe the finished backend contract, not the transitional SQLite shape

deferred_seams: server/projectors.ts convertEvent callback - non-Effect, marked TODO(gov-migration), needs SyncEvent.init() signature change
server/shared/fence.ts load() - non-Effect callback, marked TODO(gov-migration)
cli/cmd/db.ts - CLI shell tool, may need SQLite access for interactive debugging
out_of_scope: DuckDB analytical sidecar (Phase 1.7) - stretch goal deferred
Adding new database-backed features beyond the migration
Refactoring the project's Effect service patterns beyond what's needed for the adapter
